title: Config 4: sgd width=192 depth=3 batch=64 aug=rotation
methodology: Generated a 3-hidden-layer MLP with width 192, batch size 64, sgd at lr=0.002, dropout=0.3, weight_decay=0.0001, augmentation=rotation, and label_smoothing=0.02.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
